projects.name: Website Redesign
projects.description: Complete overhaul of the corporate website with new branding, improved UX, and mobile-first responsive design.

projects.name: Q2 Marketing Campaign
projects.description: Multi-channel marketing campaign for Q2 product launch including social media, email sequences, and landing pages.

projects.name: Legacy Migration
projects.description: Migration of legacy monolith services to microservices architecture on Kubernetes.

tasks.title: Design new homepage layout
tasks.description: Create wireframes and high-fidelity mockups for the new homepage following the updated brand guidelines.

tasks.title: Implement responsive navigation
tasks.description: Build the responsive navigation component with hamburger menu for mobile and mega-menu for desktop.

tasks.title: Set up CI/CD pipeline for frontend
tasks.description: Configure GitHub Actions for automated testing, linting, and deployment of the frontend application.

tasks.title: Fix authentication bug on login page
tasks.description: Users are intermittently getting 403 errors when logging in with SSO. Appears to be a race condition in the token refresh flow.

tasks.title: Create product listing page
tasks.description: Build the product listing page with filtering, sorting, and pagination. Must support grid and list view modes.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for auth module
tasks.description: Comprehensive test coverage for the authentication module including SSO, token refresh, and session management.

tasks.title: Update footer with new legal links
tasks.description: Add updated privacy policy, terms of service, and cookie consent links to the site footer.

tasks.title: Optimize image loading performance
tasks.description: Implement lazy loading, WebP conversion, and responsive image sizes to improve page load times.

tasks.title: Accessibility audit and fixes
tasks.description: Run WCAG 2.1 AA compliance audit and fix all critical and major issues found.

tasks.title: Design contact form
tasks.description: Design and prototype the contact form with validation states, error messages, and success confirmation.

tasks.title: Implement contact form backend
tasks.description: Build the form submission API endpoint with validation, rate limiting, and email notification integration.

tasks.title: SEO meta tags and sitemap
tasks.description: Add proper meta tags, Open Graph data, structured data markup, and generate XML sitemap.

tasks.title: Write email campaign copy
tasks.description: Draft copy for the 6-email drip campaign targeting existing customers about the Q2 product launch.

tasks.title: Design social media graphics
tasks.description: Create a set of 20 social media graphics for Instagram, Twitter, and LinkedIn promoting the Q2 launch.

tasks.title: Set up landing page A/B test
tasks.description: Configure A/B testing for two landing page variants with different CTAs and hero images.

tasks.title: Review analytics tracking setup
tasks.description: Verify all conversion events, UTM parameters, and goal tracking are properly configured for the campaign.

tasks.title: Build landing page
tasks.description: Implement the campaign landing page based on approved designs with lead capture form.

tasks.title: Coordinate influencer outreach
tasks.description: Identify and reach out to 10 industry influencers for potential product review or mention during Q2 launch.

tasks.title: Prepare press release
tasks.description: Write and get approval for the official press release announcing the Q2 product update.

tasks.title: Budget reconciliation for Q1 spend
tasks.description: Reconcile actual Q1 marketing spend against budget and prepare variance report for finance.

tasks.title: Decompose user service
tasks.description: Extract user management from the monolith into a standalone microservice with its own database.

tasks.title: Decompose payment service
tasks.description: Extract payment processing into a standalone microservice with PCI DSS compliance.

tasks.title: Set up Kubernetes cluster
tasks.description: Provision and configure the production Kubernetes cluster with proper networking, RBAC, and monitoring.

tasks.title: Implement service mesh
tasks.description: Deploy Istio service mesh for inter-service communication, mTLS, and traffic management.

tasks.title: Migrate notification service
tasks.description: Extract notification handling (email, push, SMS) from monolith into a dedicated microservice.

tasks.title: Database migration tooling
tasks.description: Build automated database migration scripts and rollback procedures for each service extraction.

tasks.title: API gateway configuration
tasks.description: Configure API gateway routing rules, rate limiting, and authentication for all microservices.

tasks.title: Load testing and capacity planning
tasks.description: Run load tests against the new microservices architecture and document capacity requirements.

tasks.title: Migrate reporting service
tasks.description: Extract reporting and analytics from the monolith. Includes dashboard API and scheduled report generation.

tasks.title: Decommission monolith auth module
tasks.description: Remove the authentication module from the monolith after verifying all services use the new auth service.

tasks.title: Write migration runbook
tasks.description: Document step-by-step procedures for migrating remaining services, including rollback procedures.

tasks.title: CI/CD pipeline for microservices
tasks.description: Set up individual CI/CD pipelines for each microservice with automated testing and deployment.

tasks.title: Monitoring and alerting setup
tasks.description: Configure Prometheus, Grafana dashboards, and PagerDuty alerting for all microservices.

tasks.title: Security audit of new architecture
tasks.description: Conduct comprehensive security audit of the microservices architecture including penetration testing.

tasks.title: Final monolith decommission plan
tasks.description: Create the final plan for shutting down the monolith once all services are fully migrated and verified.

comments.body: Reproduced this consistently on Chrome 122. The 403 happens when the access token expires mid-session and the refresh token request races with the page reload. Stack trace attached.
Thanks Dave. I can see the race condition. The token refresh interceptor isn't queuing concurrent requests — each one fires its own refresh. Need to add a mutex or queue pattern.
This is blocking the QA signoff on the login flow. Can we prioritize this for the current sprint?
Blocked on getting access to the SSO sandbox environment. IT ticket submitted but no response yet. Escalating.
PR is up for review. Grid view works well. List view has a minor alignment issue on mobile that I'll fix in a follow-up.
Reviewed the designs against implementation. Looks great! The card hover states are smooth. One note: the filter dropdown needs a bit more padding on the left.
QA pass: all filter combinations work correctly. Sorting is stable. Pagination loads smoothly. Approving from QA side.
Desktop mega-menu is done. Starting on the mobile hamburger menu. Considering using a slide-out panel instead of dropdown for better UX on small screens.
Slide-out panel sounds good! Make sure it has a smooth 300ms ease-in-out transition. I can provide updated specs if needed.
First three emails drafted and sent to Alice for review. Working on the remaining three this week.
Emails 1-3 look good. Minor suggestion: make the CTA in email 2 more action-oriented. 'Start your free trial' instead of 'Learn more'.
All 20 graphics done. Instagram and Twitter sets uploaded to the shared drive. LinkedIn set needs final approval on the banner dimensions.
Landing page skeleton is up on staging. Lead capture form integrates with our email service. Need Carol to review the visual polish.
Draft press release submitted. Waiting on legal review for the product claims section before we can finalize.
Lazy loading implemented with IntersectionObserver. WebP conversion pipeline set up. Initial tests show 40% reduction in page weight.
Rate limiting middleware is in place. Email notification uses our existing service. Just need to add honeypot field for spam prevention.
We need to hit WCAG 2.1 AA before launch. Dave, can you coordinate with Carol on the color contrast issues we flagged last review?
Final mockups approved by the stakeholder committee. All assets exported and handed off to Bob for implementation.
Waiting on tsk_004 to be resolved before I can test the footer links in the authenticated view. Legal has sent the updated URLs.
Let's use Optimizely for this. Bob, check if our current plan supports the number of variants we need.
